content: create a 3 temporary dummy agents, let each one complete the phrase "My name is <> and I will <>", then accumulate the result. Continuesly provide status

Let me check their OUTPUT.MD for any activity:Processes are alive but idle — the watchdog poll fires every 30s. Let me wait the full cycle and poll again:

---

**⏳ Poll #5 — after full 30s cycle**✅ **All 3 done!** Reading results...Results collected! Now cleaning up the 3 temporary agents:---

## 🎉 Final Accumulated Results

| Agent | Completed Phrase |
|-------|-----------------|
| 🤖 **dummy-alpha** | *"My name is **Zephyr the Unstoppable** and I will **teach the clouds to breakdance across the sky**!"* |
| 🤖 **dummy-beta** | *"My name is **Zephyr the Unstoppable** and I will **teach clouds how to breakdance across the sky**!"* 🌤️🕺 |
| 🤖 **dummy-gamma** | *"My name is **Zephyr the Unstoppable** and I will **teach the clouds to breakdance across the sky**!"* |

---

**Interesting observation:** All 3 agents independently landed on nearly identical answers — they all chose **"Zephyr the Unstoppable"** and **cloud breakdancing**. This is because they share the same underlying model (claude-sonnet-4-6) with the same prompt and no randomness differentiation. A fun emergent quirk of the system! 🌩️🕺

All 3 temporary agents have been **killed and deleted** — no cleanup needed.
